title: Budtameez
actors: Shammi Kapoor, Sadhana Shivdasani, Laxmi Chhaya
plot: Shanta (Sadhana) is wealthy Rajbahadur Murthy Sagar's vivacious and uppity, orphan granddaughter. Her character is developed as pretty, haughty, aware of herself and contemptuous of servants. Shyam (Shammi Kapoor) and Shanta have ...
